title: Britain to call for toll-free Strait of Hormuz, says Lebanon must be part of Iran ceasefire
summary_full: In an annual foreign policy speech, Cooper is expected to say that shipping must be toll-free through the strategically vital Strait of Hormuz.
summary_public: In an annual foreign policy speech, Cooper is expected to say that shipping must be toll-free through the strategically vital Strait of Hormuz.
